intro: Veronica ritteriana is a perennial plant species, commonly known as the alpine speedwell, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems.
